case_title: JAMES EDWARD FORD JR. VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED DWAYNE LOCKET. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-11-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-11-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF JAMES EDWARD FORD JR. IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DWAYNE LOCKET. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FORD JR., JAMES EDWARD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
